sections.paragraph:
Exo 26:4 36:11 elsewhere only in plur. constr. קְצֹות with suff. קְצֹותָם f.-

(1) end, extremity-(a) of space, Exo 25:19 28:23 , 24 Exo 28:24, 26 Exo 28:26. קְצֹות הָאָרֶץ the ends of the earth, i.e. of the most remote people, Isa 40:28 41:5 . אַרְבַּע קְצֹות הַשָּׁמַיִם the four extremities of the heaven (quarters of the world), Jer 49:36. מִקָּצָה from the extreme part, Exo 26:4 36:11 . Metaph., Job 26:14, קְצֹות דְּרָכָיו “the extremities of his deeds,” i.e. a small part, as it were the extreme lines of the divine works.

(2) the sum, mass, 1Ki 12:31 13:33 .
